sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, DATE '2023-01-01', 'New Year'), (2, DATE '2023-02-28', 'Leap Year');
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER);
SELECT dayname(DATE ( (3 ** 4) - 12 )) AS day_name, value FROM test_numbers WHERE value > (3 ** 1) AND value < (3 ** 2);
SELECT d.event_date, d.description, dayname(d.event_date) AS weekday_name FROM test_dates d JOIN test_numbers n ON n.value = (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_numbers) WHERE d.event_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT n.id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE dayname(d.event_date) = 'Monday') AS count_mondays FROM test_dates d JOIN test_numbers n ON n.id = (1 ** 2) GROUP BY n.id HAVING count_mondays > 0;
SELECT value, dayname(DATE (NULLIF( (3 ** 4), (1 ** 2) ))) AS weekday FROM test_numbers WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT 'Result: ' || dayname(NULLIF(MIN(event_date), NULL)) AS weekday_name FROM empty_dates;
